---
title: "Phase 0: Pre-Flight Validation"
author: "Geoffrey Ochieng"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(kableExtra)
```

# Phase 0: Pre-Flight Validation

## BLAST Results

```{r blast}
blast <- read.delim("../../00_preflight/results/blast/ATPase_gamma_tblastn.tsv", header=FALSE)
colnames(blast) <- c("qseqid", "sseqid", "pident", "length", "evalue", "bitscore", 
                     "mismatch", "gapopen", "qstart", "qend", "sstart", "send")

blast %>% 
  select(qseqid, sseqid, pident, length, evalue, bitscore) %>%
  kable(caption = "BLAST tBLASTn Results for ATPase γ") %>%
  kable_styling()
```

**Interpretation:**
- Identity: 97.806% (highly conserved)
- E-value: 2.79e-141 (extremely significant)
- Full-length hit: 319/319 aa (99.7% coverage)

## BUSCO Results

```{r busco}
busco_df <- data.frame(
  Category = c("Complete (S)", "Complete (D)", "Fragmented", "Missing"),
  Percentage = c(97.7, 0.0, 0.7, 1.5)
)

ggplot(busco_df, aes(x=reorder(Category, -Percentage), y=Percentage, fill=Category)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", color="black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("Complete (S)"="darkgreen", "Complete (D)"="lightgreen",
                              "Fragmented"="orange", "Missing"="red")) +
  labs(title="BUSCO Genome Completeness", x="Category", y="Percentage (%)") +
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme(legend.position="none") +
  ylim(0, 105)

ggsave("../latex/figures/busco_completeness.png", width=6, height=4, dpi=300)
```

## SRA Toolkit Test

**Accession:** SRR390436  
**Spots:** 94,034,194  
**Reads:** 188,068,388  
**Status:** ✓ Successfully downloaded and converted

## Summary

All Phase 0 validation objectives completed successfully. Infrastructure is ready for Phase 1.
